title: Deft Events Registry
description: Schema for events/registry.json. Validates the structural event registry that lists detection-bound and behavioral framework events. The registry is the single source of truth for event names, payload contracts, and detector/consumer pointers. See events/event-record.schema.json for the shape of an emitted event record.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor tooling.

version.description: Registry schema version. Bumped when the registry's own shape changes (not when individual events are added/removed).

events.description: Registered events. Order is not significant, but names MUST be unique.

name.description: Canonical event name. Convention: lowercase, colon-separated namespace (e.g. 'pre-cutover:detected', 'session:interrupted').

category.description: detection-bound: detectable from filesystem state alone. behavioral: requires runtime instrumentation (agent emission point or script-internal capture).

description.description: Human-readable description of what the event represents.

trigger.description: Free-form pointer to the detection logic or emission point (file::function or skill section).

payload.description: Field-name -> contract-string map. Each value is a free-form description of the field's type and meaning.

consumers.description: Pointers to skills, tasks, or scripts that consume this event by name. At least one consumer is required so the surface stays usable.
